manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a street physician still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of street physician in and around Ashwake Port, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashwake Port workable through the obligations of street physician while managing the immediate pressure of harbor ash clogging in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Ashwake Port, that usually means carrying harbor ash clogging, storm-whirlpool risk, port rivalry without letting the role of street physician visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Cindri Ashvein can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
